name: Prime Golf Simulators
about: Prime Golf Simulators offers an indoor golf experience with a focus on accessibility and social enjoyment. The facility provides a bar and food service, alongside multiple simulator bays equipped with free-to-use golf clubs. Patrons can book time by the hour, join virtual leagues, or host private events, making it a versatile venue for casual players and social gatherings. The pricing model is centered on hourly rental, offering flexibility for individuals, small groups, and those looking for a post-work or weekend outing.
why_golfers_like_it: No need to bring your own clubs, as free-to-use sets are provided
Social environment with a full bar and food menu available on-site
Flexible booking options for hourly play, leagues, and private events
Multiple simulator bays allow for group outings or individual practice

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food service available, with a link to the bar menu provided
Full bar service available, serving drinks and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, Prime Golf Simulators provides free-to-use golf clubs for all guests.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the venue has a full bar and kitchen with its own menu available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time for 18 holes, as rentals are booked by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue hosts birthday parties and is generally family-oriented, making it suitable for kids.
